questions.question: As per a recent study, which national park of India is releasing more carbon than it is absorbing?
questions.explanation: As per a recent research, Kaziranga National Park in Assam, is releasing more carbon than it is absorbing. The National Park is home to the largest-population of the one-horned rhinoceros in the world. Usually, forests absorb more carbon than they release, which makes them carbon sinks. This is mainly due to decreasing rainfall in the region.

questions.question: ’SMILE’ is a Central Sector scheme launched by which Union Ministry?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

answer.label: A
answer.text: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

questions.explanation: The Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment has launched the Central Sector scheme “SMILE: Support for Marginalised Individuals for Livelihood and Enterprise”. This umbrella scheme is designed to provide welfare measures to the Transgender community and the people engaged in the act of begging. The Ministry has allocated Rs. 365 Crore for the scheme from 2021-22 to 2025-26.

questions.question: Which space agency has released the first visible light images of the surface of Venus from space?
questions.explanation: NASA’s Parker Solar Probe has captured its first visible light images of the surface of Venus from space. Parker used its Wide-Field Imager (WISPR) to image the entire night side in wavelengths of the visible spectrum and extending into the near-infrared. Venus’ surface is usually hidden from sight as it is covered in thick clouds.

questions.question: ‘Indian National Women’s Day’ is observed every year to commemorate the birth anniversary of which personality?
questions.explanation: Indian National Women’s Day is observed every year on 13 February to commemorate the birth anniversary of Sarojini Naidu. She was also called ‘Nightingale of India’ or ‘Bharat Kokila’. Sarojini Naidu was the first woman Governor of Uttar Pradesh and the first woman ever to be elected as the President of the Indian National Congress.

questions.question: Paul-Henri Sandaogo Damiba has been declared President of which country?
questions.explanation: Paul-Henri Sandaogo Damiba, Lieutenant-colonel in the national armed forces, has been declared President of the African country Burkina Faso. The country’s top constitutional body has announced this decision after a coup last month. In the month of January, officers led by Damiba forced out the country’s elected president, Roch Marc Christian Kabore.

questions.question: Agriculture Infrastructure and Development Cess (AIDC) was reduced to cut the tax on importing which product?
questions.explanation: India has cut its tax on crude palm oil (CPO) imports to 5 percent from 7.5 percent. The reduction in the tax, known as ‘Agriculture Infrastructure and Development Cess (AIDC)’, will widen the gap between the CPO and refined palm oil import duties. This will make it cheaper for Indian refiners to import CPO. India is the world’s biggest edible oil importer.

questions.question: Asteroid (130) Elektra, which was seen in the news, is known for which feature?
questions.explanation: Astronomers have recently discovered a third moon orbiting the main-belt asteroid (130) Elektra, making it the first ‘Quadruple Asteroid’ ever found. (130) Elektra is a large main-belt asteroid, first discovered in 1873 by Litchfield Observatory astronomers. It has an effective diameter of 199 km. The discovery of first quadruple asteroid system will help in understanding the mechanisms of the formation of these satellites.

questions.question: Which country is the co-host of the UN pledging summit to address the humanitarian crisis in Afghanistan?
questions.explanation: UK has announced to be the co-host of an upcoming United Nations virtual pledging summit to address the humanitarian crisis in Afghanistan. As per the UK government, the virtual pledging conference is aimed to help the UN raise USD 4.4 billion for Afghanistan. It is the largest amount the UN has ever requested for a single country.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry launched the Scheme for Economic Empowerment of DNTs (SEED)?

options.label: B
options.text: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Women and Child Development

answer.label: B
answer.text: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

questions.explanation: Union Minister for Social Justice and Empowerment, Dr. Virendra Kumar launched the Scheme for Economic Empowerment of DNTs (SEED). It aims to promote the welfare of De-notified, Nomadic and Semi Nomadic Communities. The Department of Social Justice & Empowerment has developed an online portal to ensure seamless registration and data storage of these communities

questions.question: ‘INSACOG’ is a ‘SARS-CoV-2 Genomics Consortium’ of which country?
questions.explanation: INSACOG is India’s SARS-CoV-2 Genomics Consortium. It is a network of laboratories for genomic sequencing and surveillance. Recently, India announced that is ready to extend its SARS-CoV-2 Genomics Consortium (INSACOG) in the neighbourhood as part of the fight against COVID-19. This was announced by Foreign Secretary Harsh Vardhan Shringla at the COVID-19 Global Action Meeting convened by the US.
